evidence_excerpt: The patient died at the age of 3 years and 2 months.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Marked muscle weakness since birth with only mild improvement over time and ongoing respiratory insufficiency requiring mechanical ventilation.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: The patient died at the age of 3 years and 2 months (approximately 12 months after the diagnostic evaluation at 26 months).

notes_on_uncertainty: Index time approximated as the diagnostic workup at 26 months (muscle biopsy and exome sequencing). Longitudinal details between index and death are limited; cause of death not specified.
